name: Holiday Sun Catchers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Line a cookie sheet with aluminum foil.
3. Spray the sides of the cookie cutters with nonstick cooking spray and place them on the foil-lined cookie sheet.
4. Unwrap Lifesavers candies and place them inside the cookie cutters, filling as much of the cutter as possible in a single layer.
5. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes or until the candies are melted.
6. Remove from oven and immediately use a drinking straw to cut holes at the top of each Sun Catcher.
7. If the Sun Catchers harden too quickly, return them to the oven for an additional minute (be careful as the cookie cutters and candy will be hot).
8. Once cooled, carefully peel off the foil from the Sun Catchers.
9. Break off any excess candy around the edges of the cookie cutter.
10. Thread a ribbon or string through the hole at the top to create a loop for hanging.
